label: p10_d10_post_splitk_4k_decode_rocprof
hardware: local RX 7900 XTX / gfx1100 24 GiB card
profile_method: rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv; paired 4K/0 prefill-only trace and 4K/16 trace, then scripts/qwen35_gguf_rocprof_summary.py --strip-prefill-prefix.

commands.prefill_4k_0: rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv -d /tmp/hipengine-p10-d10-gguf-splitk-rocprof/prefill -o trace -- env HIPENGINE_GGUF_ALLOW_UNSAFE_QWEN35MOE_FASTPATHS=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 4096 --decode-tokens 0 --warmup-decode-tokens 0 --warmup-runs 0 --measured-runs 1 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --use-gemv-decode --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/hipengine-p10-d10-gguf-splitk-rocprof/prefill/bench.json
commands.decode_4k_16: rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv -d /tmp/hipengine-p10-d10-gguf-splitk-rocprof/decode -o trace -- env HIPENGINE_GGUF_ALLOW_UNSAFE_QWEN35MOE_FASTPATHS=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 4096 --decode-tokens 16 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --warmup-runs 0 --measured-runs 1 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --use-gemv-decode --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/hipengine-p10-d10-gguf-splitk-rocprof/decode/bench.json

findings: Expected split-K grouped-GQA decode kernels are present: qwen35_paged_full_attn_decode_split_k_ctx_tensor_gqa_kernel and qwen35_paged_full_attn_decode_split_k_reduce_gate_kernel.
After P10.D8, full_attention_decode is no longer the top 4K decode bucket: it is 15.984 ms / 16 tokens (10.21%, ~0.999 ms/token).
The largest remaining 4K decode bucket is dense_q8_0_t16_gemv_decode_p9 at 55.501 ms / 16 tokens (35.45%, ~3.469 ms/token), followed by selected MoE T16 GEMVs.
Next optimization focus should move from attention split-K to dense/shared Q8_0 T16 GEMV and selected-MoE T16 GEMV decode families, with router/GDN as secondary buckets.

validation.summary_tool_tests: PYTHONPATH=. uv run pytest tests/test_qwen35_gguf_rocprof_summary.py -q -> 70 passed
